meta.name: ReSet Call Points
meta.description: Resettable manual call points for fire alarm systems
meta.heroTitle: Resettable Manual Call Point with Break-Glass Simulation
meta.heroDescription:
Resettable manual call point designed to simulate glass-break activation without component replacement. Equipped with a visible activation indicator and a key-operated reset mechanism for reuse.

Available in multiple colors with options for flush, surface, or double-gang mounting, and offered in two electrical configurations.

Intended for fire alarm and security systems requiring rapid reset and reduced maintenance costs.

options.01: #01 Standard fire model with 470/680 Ω resistor, Series 01
options.05: #05 Sav-wire (2-wire) with 470/680 Ω resistor and diode, Series 05
